title: Anthropic’s Mythos AI Triggers Bank Security Alarm, FM Sitharaman Steps In

title: Trump administration cracking down
description: The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies’ exploitation of U.S. artificial intelligence models, singling out China at a time that country is narrowing the gap with the U.S. in the AI race.

title: Meta to cut 8,000 jobs, Microsoft to offer voluntary buyouts for thousands
description: Meta is laying off about 8,000 workers, or about 10 per cent of its workforce, the company said Thursday as it continues to ramp up spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure and highly paid AI-expert hires.
content:

title: At SpaceX, AI is burning the cash that Starlink earns
description: Elon Musk is touting SpaceX as humanity's ticket to Mars. But ​the company's pitch to investors for a potentially historic IPO reveals that its main business will be the same as Big Tech: building artificial intelligence.
content:
